about.subtitle: A trusted automotive service provider with over a decade of expertise
about.storyText1: Founded in 2014, Weide Auto is headquartered in the Economic Development Zone of Fuyang City, Anhui Province. With over a decade of deep involvement in the automotive industry, we have grown into a professional automotive sales and service company. Our showroom, located at Suite 103-105, Phase 1, Hexie Xin Village, spans over 1,000 square meters with a well-organized display of a wide range of vehicles.
about.storyText2: We specialize in new and used car retail, wholesale, and export services, maintaining long-term partnerships with major brands including Volkswagen, Toyota, Honda, and BYD. Whether for individual purchases, corporate fleet procurement, or overseas export, we provide professional and efficient one-stop services.
about.storyText3: Quality First, Integrity Operations is the core value that Weide Auto has always upheld. We understand that every vehicle carries the trust and expectations of our customers. Therefore, we insist on strict sourcing standards, and all vehicles undergo a 168-point professional inspection to ensure transparent condition, fair pricing, and complete documentation.
about.growthText1: Over the past decade, Weide Auto has adhered to a customer-first philosophy, growing from a small storefront into one of the most influential automotive service providers in the Fuyang region. We have served over 5,000 customers, completed more than 10,000 vehicle transactions, and maintained a customer satisfaction rate above 98%.
about.growthText2: Through quality products, professional service, and honest business practices, we have earned the trust of our customers, with a referral rate of 60% from existing clients. Looking ahead, we will continue to innovate and elevate our service standards to deliver even better car-buying experiences.
about.timeline2014: Weide Auto founded, beginning our journey in automotive service
about.timeline2018: Showroom expanded, annual sales exceeded 1,000 units
about.timeline2022: Launched used car export business, expanding into international markets
about.timeline2024: Full digital transformation, building an integrated online-offline service platform
about.value1Desc: Over 10 years of industry experience with rich sourcing channels and a professional service team
about.value2Desc: 168-point professional inspection, no accident or flood cars, fully transparent vehicle history
about.value3Desc: New and used vehicles across all categories — sedans, SUVs, trucks — to meet every need
about.value4Desc: Transparent pricing, no hidden costs, comprehensive after-sales support for worry-free ownership
about.businessNewDesc: Multi-brand dealership with one-stop services including consultation, financing, and registration
about.businessUsedDesc: Premium selected used cars with third-party inspection certification and 7-day return policy
about.businessWholesaleDesc: Bulk purchasing for dealers, rental companies, and corporate clients with preferential pricing
about.serviceExportDesc: Professional used car export handling, serving Central Asia, Southeast Asia, and African markets
about.serviceAfterDesc: Comprehensive warranty, maintenance, and roadside assistance for complete peace of mind
about.fullAddress: Suite 103-105, Phase 1, Hexie Xin Village, Development Zone, Fuyang, Anhui
about.parkingValue: Free parking available in front of the showroom, conveniently accessible
